window.controls:
1675
!String.IsEmpty(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw)) + !String.IsEmpty(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec) 35 210 170
common/corner.png
!String.IsEmpty(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw)) + String.IsEmpty(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec) 35 210 90
common/corner_small.png
String.IsEmpty(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw)) + !String.IsEmpty(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec) 120 210 90
common/corner_small.png
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw), 0) + String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Bypass) 52 30
150 52 codecs/SDR.png
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw), 1) + String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Bypass) 52 30
150 52 codecs/HDR10.png
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw), 2) + String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Bypass) 65 30
150 33 codecs/HDR10Plus.png
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw), 3) + String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Bypass) 50 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_Vision.png
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw), 4) + String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Bypass) 57 30
150 42 codecs/HLG.png
String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),SDR) 52 30
150 52 codecs/SDR.png
String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),HDR10) 52 30
150 52 codecs/HDR10.png
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw), 2) + !String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Dolby Vision) 65 30
150 33 codecs/HDR10Plus.png
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw), 2) + String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Dolby Vision) 50 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_Vision.png
String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),Dolby Vision) 50 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_Vision.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,aac) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,aac_latm) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,ac3) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dca) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dolbydigital) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dtshd_ma) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dtsma) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dtshd_hra) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,eac3) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,mp3) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,mp3float) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,flac) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,opus) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm_bluray) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm_s16le) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm_s24le) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,truehd) | String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.is.dolby.atmos), Atmos) | String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.dts.x.type), DTS) | String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.dts.x.type), IMAX) 120 15
180 1.5 common/selectedwhite.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm_bluray) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm_s16le) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,pcm_s24le) 140 30
150 49 codecs/PCM.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,aac) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,aac_latm) 145 30
150 40 codecs/AAC.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dolbydigital) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,ac3) 135 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_Digital.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,eac3) + !String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.is.dolby.atmos), Atmos) 135 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_Digital_Plus.png
!String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,eac3) + String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.is.dolby.atmos), Atmos) 135 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_Atmos.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,truehd) + !String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.is.dolby.atmos), Atmos) 135 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_TrueHD.png
!String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,truehd) + String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.is.dolby.atmos), Atmos) 135 30
150 56 codecs/Dolby_Atmos.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,mp3) | String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,mp3float) 140 30
150 49 codecs/MP3.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dca) 150 55
100 25 codecs/DTS.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dtshd_ma) + !String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.dts.x.type), DTS) + !String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.dts.x.type), IMAX) 140 30
150 46 codecs/DTS-HD-MA.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dtshd_hra) 140 30
150 49 codecs/DTS-HD-HRA.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dtshd_ma) + String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.dts.x.type), DTS) 147 30
150 31 codecs/DTSX.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,dtshd_ma) + String.Contains(Player.Process(audio.dts.x.type), IMAX) 140 30
150 52 codecs/IMAX.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,flac) 140 30
150 45 codecs/FLAC.png
String.IsEqual(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec,opus) 140 30
150 45 codecs/OPUS.png
!-- VS10 Logo -->
35
!String.IsEmpty(Player.Process(video.source.hdr.type.raw)) + !String.IsEmpty(VideoPlayer.AudioCodec) 20 210 90

150 52 codecs/vs10.png

150 52 codecs/vs10.png
String.Contains(Player.Process(amlogic.vs10.mode),sdr) 20 30
150 52 codecs/vs10.png

15 -270 1000 80 right horizontal -10 Close Close true
auto 100 40 $LOCALIZE[31137] VideoPlayer.Content(livetv) SetProperty(PlayerInfoDialogFocus,5551,Home)
String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.dovi.has.config),1) | String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.dovi.has.header),1) | String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.hdr.has.cll),1) | String.IsEqual(Player.Process(video.hdr.has.mdcv),1)
auto 75 40 Dolby Vision - HDR SetProperty(PlayerInfoDialogFocus,5552,Home)
auto 70 40 $LOCALIZE[31634] SetProperty(PlayerInfoDialogFocus,5553,Home)
